heading: Regulations
label: 7514 Regulations
text: The Office of Personnel Management may prescribe regulations to carry out the purpose of this subchapter, except as it concerns any matter with respect to which the Merit Systems Protection Board may prescribe regulations.
notes: Effective DateSection effective 90 days after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1978 Amendment note under .Oct. 13, 1978section 907 of Pub. L. 95–454section 1101 of this title
